days.topic: Design and Implementation of Agentic AI
tasks: Read about the architecture of agentic AI systems.
Identify key components that differentiate agentic AI from traditional AI.
Create a simple diagram illustrating the design of an agentic AI system.
resources: Book: 'Artificial Intelligence: A Guide to Intelligent Systems' by Michael Negnevitsky
Article: 'Understanding Agentic AI' on Medium
Video: 'Introduction to Agentic AI' on YouTube

tasks: Complete a beginner tutorial on Python libraries for AI (e.g., NumPy, Pandas).
Set up a development environment with Jupyter Notebook.
Write a simple Python script that uses NumPy to manipulate data.
resources: Website: Codecademy Python Course
Video: 'Python for Data Science' on Coursera
Documentation: NumPy Documentation

tasks: Read about ethical frameworks for AI development.
Summarize key ethical guidelines relevant to agentic AI.
Discuss the implications of autonomy in AI on ethical practices.
resources: Article: 'Ethics of AI and Robotics' on Stanford Encyclopedia of Philosophy
Book: 'Weapons of Math Destruction' by Cathy O'Neil
Video: 'The Ethical Dilemma of AI' on TED

days.topic: Deep Dive into Agentic AI Design
tasks: Research different design patterns used in agentic AI.
Create a comparison chart between traditional AI and agentic AI designs.
Draft a proposal for a simple agentic AI project.
resources: Article: 'Design Patterns for Autonomous Agents' on ResearchGate
Book: 'Artificial Intelligence: A Modern Approach' by Stuart Russell and Peter Norvig
Video: 'Designing Autonomous Agents' on YouTube

days.topic: Advanced Programming with TensorFlow or PyTorch
tasks: Choose either TensorFlow or PyTorch and complete a beginner tutorial.
Implement a basic neural network using the chosen framework.
Experiment with modifying the network to understand its components.
resources: Website: TensorFlow Tutorials or PyTorch Tutorials
Video: 'Deep Learning with TensorFlow' on Coursera
Documentation: TensorFlow or PyTorch Documentation

tasks: Review notes on agentic AI design and implementation.
Revisit ethical considerations and frameworks discussed.
Practice explaining the differences between traditional AI and agentic AI.
resources: Personal notes and diagrams created in previous days.
Flashcards on key concepts.
Discussion forums on AI ethics and design.

tasks: Outline a capstone project that incorporates agentic AI principles.
Identify the programming languages and frameworks needed for the project.
Draft a timeline and milestones for project completion.
resources: Article: 'How to Plan an AI Project' on Towards Data Science
Book: 'AI: A Very Short Introduction' by Margaret A. Boden
Video: 'Building AI Projects' on YouTube
